reviews.review_description: Just the hands are a bit sticky but still GOOD GAME

reviews.review_title: I am the owner of chimp champs
reviews.review_description: Not self glazing but this game is really fun to play with although it doesn’t have any game modes you can only explore the 2 maps aka shop and forest now if your reading this write a review on what maps/mechanics I should add to the game and your actual feedback/opinion on this game and if you don’t know how to write a review you need to go on the mobile app go to chimp champs scroll down and press “write a review”.

I make a game too 👍
5 STARS


But this game HAS HANDS THAT ARE SOOOO STICKY 😭
